programme.title: Patth
programme.desc: Summaries. Avi comes from a poor family and lives with his mother and sister, Nandini. He sees that Nandini has befriended a local gangster by the name of Bhullar, and quietly resents this. When Nandini is killed, Avi and two male friends, Golu and Hari, decide to avenge her death - by killing Bhullar.

programme.title: Fight Club
programme.desc: The movie follows an insomniac office worker who befriends a charismatic soap salesman, and together they start an underground fight club as a way to cope with their mundane lives. As the club gains popularity, they become involved in a larger plan to undermine the consumerist society they live in.

programme.title: Shor In The City
programme.desc: A film set in Mumbai, India. The movie revolves around the lives of three men who get caught up in the chaos of the city. The first story follows two small-time crooks who attempt to pull off a heist. The second story focuses on a struggling cricketer who gets caught up in a web of corruption. The third story is about a young couple trying to find their way in the chaotic city. As their lives intersect, they must navigate through the noisy and bustling streets of Mumbai to find their own paths.

programme.title: Vighnaharta Shree Siddhivinayak
programme.desc: Manav Mehta is a successful industrialist whose personal life is in disarray. His parents leave home because of his uncourteous behavior. After problems at work, his car breaks down on the way to work, and he unintentionally visits the Siddhivinayak temple. This visit changes his life.

programme.title: Hum To Mohabbat Karega
programme.desc: To pursue his love interest, TV reporter Geeta, Raju misleads the police with false clues during a murder investigation. His lies soon land him in trouble with the police and the mafia.

programme.title: Pink
programme.desc: After being molested, Minal, along with her friends, tries to file an FIR against a politician's nephew. When the subsequent case gets rigged, Deepak, a retired lawyer, helps them to fight the case.

programme.title: Emi Liya Hai To Chukana Padega
programme.desc: A film that tells the story of a group of people who fall prey to credit card debt and are struggling to repay their loans. They come together to form a support group and devise a plan to fight against the corrupt practices of the credit card companies. The movie highlights the consequences of reckless spending and the importance of financial literacy in an engaging and thought-provoking plot.

programme.title: One Two Three
programme.desc: Three men named Laxmi Narayan—a wannabe hitman, a loyal aide to a powerful boss, and a women’s lingerie salesman—travel on business to Pondicherry and unexpectedly check into the same hotel.

programme.title: Lajja
programme.desc: The Film follows four women from different backgrounds in India as they unite to fight against misogyny and violence in their society. Forced marriage, domestic abuse, and honor killings are just some of the struggles they face. Through their determination, they discover the strength of the human spirit, inspiring others to join their fight for justice. With a powerful cast and storyline, sheds light on important social issues and the fight for women's rights. Will these women succeed in creating a better future for themselves and future generations?

programme.title: Vidrohi
programme.desc: Vidrohi is an action drama. The movie follows the story of an honest officer, Inspector Devendra Pratap Singh, whose only priority is to protect the law. He takes great risks to catch the dreaded dacoits Naag Singh and Bhoop Singh, however, the duo decide to surrender themselves to Police on the advice of a cunning man, who has a plan to protect them, and also make it hard for Devendra. Later, Devendra is arrested on the charges of murder of Bhoop Singh, however, he escapes the prison, when he learns about Bhoop Singh and Naag Singh’s plan. He then embarks the journey to catch the culprits and prove his innocence. Will he succeed in his mission

programme.title: Param Dharam
programme.desc: Savitri believes that her illegitimate child with her deceased lover, Vijay, was stillborn and did not survive. Years later, Savitri's world changes when she learns that her firstborn is alive.

programme.title: Shiv Ganga
programme.desc: A tale of love and lust, Shiv Ganga narrates how the god of love Kamdev met and subsequently lost his consort Rati, the goddess of passion.

programme.title: Vidrohi
programme.desc: Vidrohi is an action drama. The movie follows the story of an honest officer, Inspector Devendra Pratap Singh, whose only priority is to protect the law. He takes great risks to catch the dreaded dacoits Naag Singh and Bhoop Singh, however, the duo decide to surrender themselves to Police on the advice of a cunning man, who has a plan to protect them, and also make it hard for Devendra. Later, Devendra is arrested on the charges of murder of Bhoop Singh, however, he escapes the prison, when he learns about Bhoop Singh and Naag Singh’s plan. He then embarks the journey to catch the culprits and prove his innocence. Will he succeed in his mission

programme.title: Teri Payal Mere Geet
programme.desc: Premi makes a living by selling poems to Benni and falls in love with a courtesan, Laila Jaan. However, he leaves her after finding the truth about her but tries to get back with her.

programme.title: Dil Tera Aashiq
programme.desc: Thakur Ranvir Singh Chaudhary cuts ties with his sister after she marries a man from a different background. However, when she dies, the responsibility of looking after her children falls on him.

programme.title: Nikaah
programme.desc: A young and attractive woman is swept off her feet by a foreign businessman, and the pair marries. However, when the man begins dedicating himself more and more to his work, things go wrong.

programme.title: Kaash
programme.desc: Following a serious box office flop, movie star-turned-producer Ritesh (Jackie Shroff) and his wife, Pooja (Dimple Kapadia), are forced to downgrade to a simpler lifestyle. This leads to the husband becoming an alcoholic, the wife taking a menial job as a chambermaid, and their young child being forced to watch as his parents' relationship disintegrates. Ritesh and Pooja are living apart when their son is diagnosed with a fatal brain tumor, which leads to a bittersweet reunion for all three.

programme.title: R D Burman – Musical Maverick
programme.desc: A powerhouse collection of R.D. Burman's iconic hits, blending innovation, emotion, and energy. From soulful ballads to electrifying grooves, experience the genius of Pancham Da that defined Bollywood's golden soundscape.

programme.title: Best Of 70s – The Golden Era
programme.desc: Step into Bollywood’s most soulful decade with this jukebox of evergreen melodies. A rich tapestry of romance, innocence, and timeless charm – pure nostalgia from the golden 70s.

programme.title: Best Of 90s – Filmy Beats Reloaded
programme.desc: Take a ride through the vibrant 90s with peppy love anthems, dramatic duets, and emotional melodies. This jukebox celebrates the signature style of Bollywood's musical revival decade.

programme.title: Rajesh Khanna – The Superstar's Anthems
programme.desc: Revisit the unmatched charm of Rajesh Khanna with this jukebox of unforgettable melodies. Romantic, philosophical, and heartfelt – these songs defined an era and a superstar.

programme.title: Jeetendra Hits The Jumping Jack
programme.desc: Dive into Jeetendra’s iconic hits—The Jumping Jack’s timeless energy! Relive the magic of Bollywood’s golden era with foot-tapping beats, romance, and pure nostalgia!

programme.title: Neetu Singh Evergreen Hits
programme.desc: Turn up the retro vibes with Neetu Singh’s greatest hits! A birthday playlist packed with nostalgia, romance, and endless charm.

programme.title: Superhits Of 90s
programme.desc: Relive the '90s with Superhits! Romantic melodies, peppy beats, and timeless nostalgia—dance, sing along, and fall in love all over again!

programme.title: Dharmendra He Man Of Bollywood
programme.desc: Time-travel through Dharmendra's iconic hits – the ultimate He-Man of Bollywood! Timeless romance, unforgettable melodies that define an era of pure masala magic!

programme.title: Alka Yagnik Superhit Singer
programme.desc: Press play on nostalgia! Alka Yagnik's velvet voice brings back memories with these evergreen hits that still give us goosebumps today.

programme.title: Dimple Kapadia & Neetu Singh
programme.desc: Dance through the disco era with Dimple & Neetu! Playful whispers, foot-tapping romance, and melodies that defined a generation’s dreams.

programme.title: Mithun Chakraborty
programme.desc: Get ready to groove with Mithun Da's greatest hits! From 'Disco Dancer' to romantic ballads, this collection is pure Bollywood retro gold.

programme.title: Best Of B R Chopra
programme.desc: Dive into these timeless tracks that shaped Hindi cinema's musical heritage. The golden touch of B.R. Chopra - where every song became legendary.

programme.title: Hema Malini Parveen Babi Hit Bollywood Divas
programme.desc: The Original Bollywood Divas! Hema's elegance + Parveen's sass = Unbeatable 70s magic. Press play for nostalgia in every note!

programme.title: Dance Hits
programme.desc: Pure nostalgia on the dance floor! Celebrate the vibrant sounds of old-school Hindi dance music with timeless beats and retro charm.

programme.title: Shahenshah Of Bollywood-83rd Birthday Special Vol 2
programme.desc: Iconic melodies of Amitabh Bachchan reflecting romance,pride, and cinematic brilliance.

programme.title: Sita Ram Chaddha
programme.desc: Sita Ram Chaddha's married daughter has the option to seek substantial financial assistance from her affluent brother, but her unique request ends up transforming the lives of everyone involved in unexpected and remarkable ways.

programme.title: Chumbak
programme.desc: "Chumbak" follows Aryan and Mitisha, once inseparable lovers, who reunite after years. The old flame reignites, but life has diverged their paths. Caught between duty and desire, they must navigate tough choices, testing their love against the changed tides of circumstance. A poignant tale of love's resilience in the face of reality.

programme.title: Live A Little Part 2
programme.desc: After 5 years, Nimisha and Atish meet again at a party. She is awarded Best Emerging Entrepreneur by none other than Atish. Atish couldn't let another day go by without confronting Nimisha. Both seem happy and has moved on in their lives until they realize they've been living in a delusion. They reminded each other of their Pact which was made 5 years ago. Live a Little . Then made sudden plans which led to unexpected confessions which led to the most memorable night of their lives.

programme.title: Sizzle Of Shadows
programme.desc: A doctor encounters a couple suffering from Dementia, and attempts to alleviate their condition. Upon receiving a call from the couple's son who lives in America, the doctor visits their home and is shocked to find the couple arguing and displaying symptoms of Dementia. The doctor diagnoses the woman with Lewy bodies Dementia, which causes visual hallucinations.

programme.title: Arjun
programme.desc: Arjun is a soldier who works more like a mercenary in a never-ending war. He willfully follows the brutal orders of his commanding officer until one day, his entire world turns upside down. Examining one soldier's journey toward redemption, we show that our shared humanity is always worth fighting for underneath the trappings of all that divides us.

programme.title: Ramdeen (now & Then)
programme.desc: This is a story based on the deep-rooted stance of feudalism in two chosen timelines; 1965 and present-day respectively. The protagonist Ramesh, is a skinny, middle-aged man who works as an office boy at a production house, despite having a mundane and monotonous lifestyle he is very kind, well-spoken, and calm by nature. The stories of Ramdin and Ramesh unravel back and forth and give us a compelling idea about how instilled the concept of feudalism is, in societies new and old.

programme.title: Ransom Handsome
programme.desc: Ayan and Kabir are small time criminals involved in the kidnapping of a daughter of a dangerous mob boss, Nicole. All they have to do is stick to a kidnapping checklist and check off items as they come to pass. But their novice actions force them to interact with Nicole. Her innocent interactions result in a significantly jacked up ransom amount. Nicole manipulates the situation. Ayan and Kabir struggle to survive as Nicole starts executing her master plan to leave no witnesses behind

programme.title: Rishtey
programme.desc: Ria, a rising model, and Juhi, a top creative director, share an unbreakable bond—until ace photographer Vicky enters their lives. As passion and ambition collide, their friendship is put to the ultimate test.

programme.title: Salwate
programme.desc: The tale of a mother and son trapped in a challenging home situation and how a straightforward life tip helped them escape their predicament.

programme.title: Scooter
programme.desc: Aniket an entrepreneur is in his hometown, coming after a very long time. Trying to sell his father's home. After spending few hours in that house he goes back into his childhood memories. Aniket as a young boy was very stubborn. This time he was stuck up on a car. Like his many friends, he also wanted to have a car for his family, instead, his father buys a Scooter. He feels very humiliated and refuses to go by it. The story portrays a basic 90s FatherSon relationship

programme.title: Shiva
programme.desc: A narrative following a young boy from the Potraj community, who confronts his stepfather, urging him to conform to tradition rather than pursue his aspiration of education and a brighter future. It underscores Shiva's resilience and support system as he strives to fulfill his dreams against all odds.

programme.title: Something Like Love
programme.desc: Something like love is the story of Karan and Simran, who have perceived love differently all their lives. Karan's love language is poetry, and for Simran, if love isn't DDLJ, it isn't love.

programme.title: Pardesi Love
programme.desc: The central theme of "Pardesi Love" focuses on a romance involving an Indian taxi driver and a foreign woman who arrives in India from Canada to meet her online boyfriend and fulfill her mother's final rites. However, the situation is far from straightforward. Jasmin intends to wed her boyfriend, Sunny, and establish a life in India, while simultaneously, the cab driver, Satya, develops feelings for her. Yet, the complexities of their relationships and interactions form the crux of the film's narrative, showcasing the dynamic among these three individuals.

programme.title: Pilibhit
programme.desc: Inspired by true stories, Siraj, a righteous, impoverished flute maker, resides at the edge of the forests of Pilibhit, North India, where man-eating tigers thrive. His mounting livelihood pressures and tragedies corner him to take a drastic measure that threatens to tear down his values and a loved one.

programme.title: Pintu
programme.desc: In a single day, young Pintu skips school, dreams of a better life inspired by a wealthy boy's shoes, and confronts the harsh realities of his underprivileged world, revealing his family's struggles and his own fragile hopes for the future.

programme.title: Raah
programme.desc: Raah is an exploration of the several stages of struggle when one steps out to pursue a dream. Sahir lives in Mumbai city with his family. The emotional and poetic narrative explores his faith, kinship and his struggle to establish himself as a poet/writer.

programme.title: Qurbat
programme.desc: In a stormy night, tension unfolds in the affluent household of Akram and Noorie, a middle-aged couple. Abdul, their seventy years old servant and his young petite wife Fatima share the space. Each resident of the household is driven by their dark desires. The morbid darkness of the night hides the truth in that household. Qurbat is a dark psychological thriller involving these two women who draw close for their respective liberation.

programme.title: Maggi
programme.desc: How a delivery guy gets entangled in a game orchestrated by a mysterious woman, leaving him questioning her true intentions.

programme.title: Saanjh
programme.desc: SAANJH tells the story of Shyam and Sandhya, childhood friends who meet for the last time. Shyam loves Sandhya, but she sees him only as a friend. We surprisingly learn that Shyam is actually struggling with mental disorder, and Sandhya is nothing but just in his imagination. Despite the calm riverbank setting, Shyam's inner struggles are evident. As Shyam faces reality, he realizes he must accept things as they are, showing the power of love and understanding ourselves.

programme.title: Once Upon A Time In Office
programme.desc: A young woman is feeling uncomfortable around older male colleagues who are treating her unfairly. She seeks help from HR but does not receive the support she needs. She wonders why she is always the one being blamed and considers ways to address the situation and overcome it

programme.title: Chumbak
programme.desc: "Chumbak" follows Aryan and Mitisha, once inseparable lovers, who reunite after years. The old flame reignites, but life has diverged their paths. Caught between duty and desire, they must navigate tough choices, testing their love against the changed tides of circumstance. A poignant tale of love's resilience in the face of reality.

programme.title: Passbook
programme.desc: Set in the 90's when ATM and instant money transfer were still many years far away. In order to withdraw money people had to rely on a lengthy process of MT or Money Transfer which contained a bank to bank secret code.

programme.title: Pardesi Love
programme.desc: The central theme of "Pardesi Love" focuses on a romance involving an Indian taxi driver and a foreign woman who arrives in India from Canada to meet her online boyfriend and fulfill her mother's final rites. However, the situation is far from straightforward. Jasmin intends to wed her boyfriend, Sunny, and establish a life in India, while simultaneously, the cab driver, Satya, develops feelings for her. Yet, the complexities of their relationships and interactions form the crux of the film's narrative, showcasing the dynamic among these three individuals.

programme.title: Ramdeen (now & Then)
programme.desc: This is a story based on the deep-rooted stance of feudalism in two chosen timelines; 1965 and present-day respectively. The protagonist Ramesh, is a skinny, middle-aged man who works as an office boy at a production house, despite having a mundane and monotonous lifestyle he is very kind, well-spoken, and calm by nature. The stories of Ramdin and Ramesh unravel back and forth and give us a compelling idea about how instilled the concept of feudalism is, in societies new and old.

programme.title: Signature
programme.desc: A single mother, living in a small village, takes care of her little daughter’s educational expenses by doing tailoring work. One day, she receives a pension letter, for which she has to visit the Gramin bank. There, she encounters something unexpected.

programme.title: On The Spot
programme.desc: On a fateful day, Parul hails a taxi to visit her boyfriend Ansh. Ansh, eagerly anticipating her arrival, is thrown into restlessness. However, their journey takes an unexpected turn when the taxi driver receives news of his daughter falling ill. Witnessing this, Parul's compassionate response sparks anger in Ansh. Yet, in the face of adversity, Parul's decision unfolds, offering inspiration to the youth. This is the tale of "On the Spot."

programme.title: Pilibhit
programme.desc: Inspired by true stories, Siraj, a righteous, impoverished flute maker, resides at the edge of the forests of Pilibhit, North India, where man-eating tigers thrive. His mounting livelihood pressures and tragedies corner him to take a drastic measure that threatens to tear down his values and a loved one.

programme.title: Prison
programme.desc: Mini undergoes an assault, and shortly thereafter, her tormentors meet a grim fate. Stricken with fear and disbelief over these uncanny coincidences, Mini questions the source of these events. Could it be her confidante Bini, or something else entirely?

programme.title: Sita Ram Chaddha
programme.desc: Sita Ram Chaddha's married daughter has the option to seek substantial financial assistance from her affluent brother, but her unique request ends up transforming the lives of everyone involved in unexpected and remarkable ways.

programme.title: O Re Saajan
programme.desc: Sajan Tiwari', in his mid 30s, works as a small time estate agent in Lucknow. He is involved in an extra-marital affair. His only son, 5 year old 'Bunty', catches him in the act. Scared out of his wits, 'Sajan' makes every possible effort to stop 'Bunty' breaking the news to his wife 'Manju'. The story is a humorous take on small town life, relationships and family.

programme.title: Rishtey
programme.desc: Ria, a rising model, and Juhi, a top creative director, share an unbreakable bond—until ace photographer Vicky enters their lives. As passion and ambition collide, their friendship is put to the ultimate test.

programme.title: Party Bhaiya Viral Hai
programme.desc: A satirical comedy on social media, Party Bhaiya follows a young man from a small village who becomes infatuated with a social media influencer through her videos. Drawn by his growing attraction, he tracks down her location to express his feelings in person. However, this encounter delivers a jarring reality check, revealing the stark differences between her online persona and real life. But in the unpredictable world of social media, surprises await, and Party Bhaiya, his online alias, learns that appearances can be deceiving.

programme.title: Makdee
programme.desc: This is the story of a woman whose captivating beauty lures men into her world, much like a spider weaving an irresistible web

programme.title: Rangdari
programme.desc: An interrogation between a cop and a criminal turns into a pre-planned crime.

programme.title: Share Baazaar
programme.desc: A satirical mockumentary that dives into the wild world of stock markets, where retail traders chase dreams, operators outsmart the game, and finfluencers sell hope (and courses). SHARE BAZAAR: Yahaan Sabhi Gyaani Hain is a sharp, hilarious take on the madness behind the money.

programme.title: Something Like Love
programme.desc: Something like love is the story of Karan and Simran, who have perceived love differently all their lives. Karan's love language is poetry, and for Simran, if love isn't DDLJ, it isn't love.

programme.title: Pendulum
programme.desc: After losing his fiancée, Vishu is drowning in grief, unable to see a way forward. On the verge of giving up, a mysterious encounter changes everything, offering him a new perspective on life. Will he embrace the second chance fate has given him?

programme.title: Scooter
programme.desc: Aniket an entrepreneur is in his hometown, coming after a very long time. Trying to sell his father's home. After spending few hours in that house he goes back into his childhood memories. Aniket as a young boy was very stubborn. This time he was stuck up on a car. Like his many friends, he also wanted to have a car for his family, instead, his father buys a Scooter. He feels very humiliated and refuses to go by it. The story portrays a basic 90s FatherSon relationship

programme.title: Panch Din
programme.desc: A Married couple meets in a cafe to take divorce but coincidentally their common friend meets them and reminds them of something which might make a shift to their minds.

programme.title: Live A Little Part 2
programme.desc: After 5 years, Nimisha and Atish meet again at a party. She is awarded Best Emerging Entrepreneur by none other than Atish. Atish couldn't let another day go by without confronting Nimisha. Both seem happy and has moved on in their lives until they realize they've been living in a delusion. They reminded each other of their Pact which was made 5 years ago. Live a Little . Then made sudden plans which led to unexpected confessions which led to the most memorable night of their lives.

programme.title: Ransom Handsome
programme.desc: Ayan and Kabir are small time criminals involved in the kidnapping of a daughter of a dangerous mob boss, Nicole. All they have to do is stick to a kidnapping checklist and check off items as they come to pass. But their novice actions force them to interact with Nicole. Her innocent interactions result in a significantly jacked up ransom amount. Nicole manipulates the situation. Ayan and Kabir struggle to survive as Nicole starts executing her master plan to leave no witnesses behind

programme.title: Oh My Star Wife
programme.desc: Story of a young married actress struggling with societal pressure over her fashion choices. Her husband's disapproval leads to arguments and a dilemma regarding societal acceptance. Ultimately, an unexpected accident brings resolution. Watch to explore how the protagonist navigates through societal expectations and challenges in her personal life.

programme.title: Saas
programme.desc: After the death of a loved one, young Yatin takes on the responsibility of caring for his ailing mother-in-law. As he prioritizes her well-being, he faces numerous hardships, intertwining their lives unexpectedly.

programme.title: Arjun
programme.desc: Arjun is a soldier who works more like a mercenary in a never-ending war. He willfully follows the brutal orders of his commanding officer until one day, his entire world turns upside down. Examining one soldier's journey toward redemption, we show that our shared humanity is always worth fighting for underneath the trappings of all that divides us.

programme.title: Prioritize Family
programme.desc: In this narrative, we follow the journey of a man who didn't treat his wife kindly. His work often invaded their home, and one day, he even invited his secretary over. Unhappy with this, his wife goes missing the next morning, making him realize her true value. Will she return? Tune in to discover the outcome.

programme.title: Pintu
programme.desc: In a single day, young Pintu skips school, dreams of a better life inspired by a wealthy boy's shoes, and confronts the harsh realities of his underprivileged world, revealing his family's struggles and his own fragile hopes for the future.

programme.title: Goals
programme.desc: As Meera, our pretty in pink protagonist comes back to Bombay after spending several months apart from her beau Ranbir, the circumstances force them to evaluate the basis of their relationship. This film is a deep dive into a young adult's core problems of emotional dishonesty and preference of style over substance.

programme.title: Dubki
programme.desc: Dubki is a story based on a true incident of a female constable in male-dominated law enforcement. Despite being a tough and dominant constable at the Lalkurti police station, Ganga Yadav was troubled several times by SHO Durgesh Mishra. Ganga complained about it to the IPS officer and asked for a transfer; however, he refused to help her. The female constable was left with no other choice but to take justice into her own hands.

programme.title: Firni
programme.desc: The next-door neighbors are having a fight and they send their rude 14-year-old daughter Firni to keep her busy.

programme.title: Dwand
programme.desc: Ruby, a lower-middle-class girl was made to believe that she is beautiful, intelligent, and different and that she deserves a worthy husband. She completed her studies and wanted to be a career girl. However, the marriage happened contrary to her expectations with a traditional man Vivek of the similar lower middle-class strata. After giving birth to a girl child she revolted and joined an advertising company to shape up her career. Here begins the nightmare.

programme.title: Duty
programme.desc: Different classes in society are intertwined, with each person's actions impacting others. When individuals from various classes fulfil their responsibilities, stability is achieved. This story explores fairness and the expression of duty among people from different social strata.

programme.title: Cycle Of Sorrows
programme.desc: Set in a rural village, this heart-wrenching story follows a poor father with a beloved daughter, who still yearns for a son as his pregnant wife prepares to give birth. Driven by financial hardship, he makes a tragic decision that not only shatters his family but leaves his relationship with his daughter and wife forever scarred. Watch this emotional tale of a father’s regret and the lasting impact on his family. Can he undo the damage he’s caused?

programme.title: Electric Piya
programme.desc: A high school girl brings a new bulb for her study lamp. The bulb is anthropomorphic and he is exultant and joyful for having the luck of lighting for her. As he lights, he falls in love with the young girl.

programme.title: Didi!
programme.desc: Imagine waking up to an annoying alarm sound. Familiar? Now imagine waking up to someone else's alarm! Why isn't anyone shutting it? Find out what happens when an annoyed brother wakes up to his sister's loud alarm and storms to her room only to find it empty.

programme.title: Desh Ki Pardesh ?
programme.desc: The film follows the Parikh's on their visit to their children settled in the US. However, to only realize that there's a lot more than just a generation gap between them. Mainly, dawning upon Hasmuk Parikh's that it's great to dream big for your children, but one must be mentally prepared that those dreams may or not have them in it.

programme.title: Universal Soldier: Day Of Reckoning
programme.desc: John awakens from a coma to discover his wife and daughter were murdered in a brutal home invasion. Haunted by images of the attack, he vows to kill the man responsible: The fight pits John against Andrew Scott and an army of genetically enhanced warriors; meanwhile, he must contend with a Uni Sol in relentless pursuit.

programme.title: The Catcher Was A Spy
programme.desc: With an ensemble cast, this gripping, espionage thriller brings to life the true story of Moe Berg a World War II spy. His mission: go behind enemy lines in Europe to assassinate the Nazi's chief nuclear scientist before the Germans develop an atomic bomb. Berg must rely on his steel-trap intellect in a high-stakes game of cat and mouse - with the fate of the world hanging in the balance.

programme.title: Untraceable
programme.desc: A FBI secret service agent, gets caught in a deadly cat-and-mouse game with a serial killer who knows that people will log onto an "untraceable" website where he conducts violent and painful murders LIVE on the net. The more people who log on and enter the website, the quicker and more violently the victim dies.

programme.title: Haywire
programme.desc: From Academy Award-winning director Steven Soderbergh of Ocean’s 11, 12 & 13 comes HAYWIRE. A Female Assassin covert operative is hired to various global missions to perform jobs which governments can't authorize. When the operation goes awry, she needs to use all of her skills & tricks to escape an international manhunt and eliminate the last remaining link of the conspiracy against her.

programme.title: Redline
programme.desc: Redline is an auto/action thriller that features an extensive exotic car collection Phantom Rolls Royce, Lamborghini Murcielago, Enzo Ferrari, Ferrari F430, Ferrari Scaglietti and two Mercedes SLR McLaren AMGs. The film follows a gorgeous young automobile fanaticize driver who becomes part of illegal drag racing competitions organized by exotic car fanatics.

programme.title: Lawless
programme.desc: We control the fear, you understand? Without the fear, we are all good as dead.’ The notorious gangster Al Capone observed that “Prohibition has made nothing but trouble,” and “I am like any other man. All I do is supply a demand.” Acclaimed director delivers a thrillingly vivid slice of American outlaw history in his epic gangster tale, LAWLESS. LAWLESS is the true story of the infamous Bondurant Brothers: three bootlegging siblings who made a run for the American Dream in Prohibition-era Virginia. The film gathers an ensemble of gifted, dynamic new-generation stars – Tom Hardy, Shia LaBeouf, Jessica Chastain, Jason Clarke, Mia Wasikowska, Dane DeHaan – alongside two of the finest actors of their generations, Guy Pearce and Gary Oldman. A riveting, intense story of Crime and Corruption, Loyalty and Love, Brutality and Tenderness, LAWLESS is a rich addition to the American Gangster Canon.

programme.title: Tekken: Kazuya's Revenge
programme.desc: Suffering from amnesia, a young man trying to discover his true identity is kidnapped by an underground crime organization and turned into a ruthless assassin

programme.title: Untraceable
programme.desc: A FBI secret service agent, gets caught in a deadly cat-and-mouse game with a serial killer who knows that people will log onto an "untraceable" website where he conducts violent and painful murders LIVE on the net. The more people who log on and enter the website, the quicker and more violently the victim dies.

programme.title: Spytime
programme.desc: Anacleto, a former secret agent, is forced to come out of retirement and protect his son, Adolfo, when his arch-enemy, Vazquez, breaks out of prison and targets him

programme.title: Universal Soldier: Regeneration
programme.desc: Terrorists kidnap the Russian Prime Minister's two kids, take Chernobyl Nuclear Power Plant and threaten to blow up a reactor. Four Universal Soldiers go in but are no match to a Next Generation UniSol. The world's only hope is to reactivate decommissioned Universal Soldier Luc Deveraux.

programme.title: Out Of Death
programme.desc: From the producers of The Irishman & Lone Survivor comes this thrilling story of Jack Harris (Bruce Willis) who must tap into his killer instincts to survive the wilderness and the human predators as he tries to help a woman who witnesses a crime and finds herself running from a rural mountain town's corrupt police department after she took a video of police killing a drug dealer.

programme.title: Poseidon Rex
programme.desc: While searching for lost treasure, deep sea divers unleash a monster that causes havoc and destruction not only in sea but also on land.

programme.title: Wrecker
programme.desc: Two beautiful young women taking a trip through the countryside, are terrorized by an unknown driver trying to run them down in a heavy duty tow truck.

programme.title: The Catcher Was A Spy
programme.desc: With an ensemble cast, this gripping, espionage thriller brings to life the true story of Moe Berg a World War II spy. His mission: go behind enemy lines in Europe to assassinate the Nazi's chief nuclear scientist before the Germans develop an atomic bomb. Berg must rely on his steel-trap intellect in a high-stakes game of cat and mouse - with the fate of the world hanging in the balance.

programme.title: Universal Soldier: Day Of Reckoning
programme.desc: John awakens from a coma to discover his wife and daughter were murdered in a brutal home invasion. Haunted by images of the attack, he vows to kill the man responsible: The fight pits John against Andrew Scott and an army of genetically enhanced warriors; meanwhile, he must contend with a Uni Sol in relentless pursuit.

programme.title: Bad Samaritan
programme.desc: Bad Samaritan is a terrifying thriller of two young car valets who use their business as a front to burglarize houses of customers while they eat. Their lives are turned upside down when they rob the home of a demented serial killer after making a shocking discovery of a woman being held captive. They must choose to run and hide, or face the killer whose dark secrets they have just exposed.

programme.title: Poseidon Rex
programme.desc: While searching for lost treasure, deep sea divers unleash a monster that causes havoc and destruction not only in sea but also on land.

programme.title: The Free Fall
programme.desc: The Free Fall is a deeply personal horror thriller, a mind bending pressure cooker that constantly challenges us, hurling us towards one of the most shocking cinematic reveals imaginable. After attempting to take her own life, a young woman must wrestle with an overbearing husband and the only way out of this hell, is to fall into it.

programme.title: Haywire
programme.desc: From Academy Award-winning director Steven Soderbergh of Ocean’s 11, 12 & 13 comes HAYWIRE. A Female Assassin covert operative is hired to various global missions to perform jobs which governments can't authorize. When the operation goes awry, she needs to use all of her skills & tricks to escape an international manhunt and eliminate the last remaining link of the conspiracy against her.

programme.desc: We control the fear, you understand? Without the fear, we are all good as dead.’ The notorious gangster Al Capone observed that “Prohibition has made nothing but trouble,” and “I am like any other man. All I do is supply a demand.” Acclaimed director delivers a thrillingly vivid slice of American outlaw history in his epic gangster tale, LAWLESS. LAWLESS is the true story of the infamous Bondurant Brothers: three bootlegging siblings who made a run for the American Dream in Prohibition-era Virginia. The film gathers an ensemble of gifted, dynamic new-generation stars – Tom Hardy, Shia LaBeouf, Jessica Chastain, Jason Clarke, Mia Wasikowska, Dane DeHaan – alongside two of the finest actors of their generations, Guy Pearce and Gary Oldman. They must choose to run and hide, or face the killer whose dark secrets they have just exposed.

programme.title: Sky Sharks
programme.desc: Deep in the ice of the antarctic, a team of geologists uncover an old Nazi warship still intact where dark experiments had occurred. In order to conquer the world, the Nazis created rocket-powered sharks whose pilots are genetically mutated, super soldiers with supernatural powers who were able to fly & destroy

programme.title: Spytime
programme.desc: Anacleto, a former secret agent, is forced to come out of retirement and protect his son, Adolfo, when his arch-enemy, Vazquez, breaks out of prison and targets him

programme.title: Jurassic Hunt
programme.desc: In this pulse-pounding Creature thriller, Female adventurer Parker joins a crew of male trophy hunters in a remote wilderness park. Their goal: slaughter genetically recreated dinosaurs & must work together to evade the giant human-hungry creatures and mercenaries hired to finish them off. This battle's about to become primitive.

programme.title: Aileen Wuornos: American Boogeywoman
programme.desc: True Story that follows America’s most notorious Female Serial killer. Based on Aileen Wuorno’s early life. Back in 1976 a young Aileen arrives in Florida searching for a new life, marries a wealthy yacht club president to start as part of Florida’s high society. Tormented by her inner demons she surrenders to her murderous impulses havoc in the peaceful community.

programme.title: Out Of Death
programme.desc: From the producers of The Irishman & Lone Survivor comes this thrilling story of Jack Harris (Bruce Willis) who must tap into his killer instincts to survive the wilderness and the human predators as he tries to help a woman who witnesses a crime and finds herself running from a rural mountain town's corrupt police department after she took a video of police killing a drug dealer.

programme.title: Ted Bundy: American Boogeyman
programme.desc: This is the true story behind the manhunt that brought America’s most fearsome boogeyman to justice. His name is Ted Bundy. A specter roams the highways of the gritty 1970s America hunting for his next prey. Tracking him are intrepid FBI female agent Kathleen & Robert Ressler organizers of the largest manhunt in history to apprehend America’s most Notorious infamous serial killer.

programme.title: Jurassic Attack
programme.desc: A group of soldiers attempting to rescue a hostage from a terrorist crash land into unfamiliar jungles which are inhabited by a group of long hidden dinosaurs. Now they must find a way out of this isolated valley before becoming prey for prehistoric predators.

programme.title: Vivarium
programme.desc: A Young couple thinking about buying their perfect single family starter home. They visits a real estate agency where they are received by a strange sales agent and find themselves trapped in a surreal, mysterious, maze-like nightmare.

programme.title: Ajay
programme.desc: Despite different backgrounds, Ajay and Manorama fall in love. Her uncles despise their alliance, plotting to drive Ajay out of her life.

programme.title: Jigariyaa
programme.desc: Good-for-nothing poet Shaamu falls for well-educated do-gooder Raadha. Just as they grow fond, cruel circumstances tear them apart.

programme.title: Imaandaar
programme.desc: A loyal village bumpkin gets a city hotel job. He realizes his boss's life is threatened and protects him, uncovering shocking revelations.

programme.title: Banjaran
programme.desc: Reshma & Kumar are haunted by past lives. They fall in love upon meeting, but their fathers try to separate them.

programme.title: Bazaar
programme.desc: A prophecy states Satpal will be killed by his eldest nephew. He throws his sister's twin son from castle walls. He survives and unites with his brother to defeat their evil uncle.

programme.title: Mandi
programme.desc: Durga's callous mother-in-law runs a strict household. Durga must teach her humility and win her heart to ease life.

programme.title: Dil Ka Rishta
programme.desc: Jai accidentally kills his lover's husband. When she gets amnesia, he comforts her, she falls for him. Guilt-ridden, he faces a dilemma: confess or reciprocate?

programme.title: Bhumika (the Role)
programme.desc: Young Shyam wishes to study with a young teacher attracted to him. She uses this as a pretext to have a physical relationship, and he falls in love.

programme.title: Pakeezah
programme.desc: Courtesan Sahibjaan falls for forest ranger Salim, but his wealthy parents oppose their union, trapping her in prostitution.

programme.title: Satta
programme.desc: Delhi politician Anuradha marries Mumbai's Vivek, an aspiring politician. He's arrested for murder, forcing her to take his place in elections.

programme.title: Kya Kehna
programme.desc: A young college girl faces hardships after becoming a single mother.

programme.title: Poseidon Rex
programme.desc: While searching for lost treasure, deep sea divers unleash a monster that causes havoc and destruction not only in sea but also on land.

programme.title: Bad Samaritan
programme.desc: Bad Samaritan is a terrifying thriller of two young car valets who use their business as a front to burglarize houses of customers while they eat. Their lives are turned upside down when they rob the home of a demented serial killer after making a shocking discovery of a woman being held captive. They must choose to run and hide, or face the killer whose dark secrets they have just exposed.

programme.title: Ted Bundy: American Boogeyman
programme.desc: This is the true story behind the manhunt that brought America’s most fearsome boogeyman to justice. His name is Ted Bundy. A specter roams the highways of the gritty 1970s America hunting for his next prey. Tracking him are intrepid FBI female agent Kathleen & Robert Ressler organizers of the largest manhunt in history to apprehend America’s most Notorious infamous serial killer.

programme.title: Redline
programme.desc: Redline is an auto/action thriller that features an extensive exotic car collection Phantom Rolls Royce, Lamborghini Murcielago, Enzo Ferrari, Ferrari F430, Ferrari Scaglietti and two Mercedes SLR McLaren AMGs. The film follows a gorgeous young automobile fanaticize driver who becomes part of illegal drag racing competitions organized by exotic car fanatics.

programme.title: Out Of Death
programme.desc: From the producers of The Irishman & Lone Survivor comes this thrilling story of Jack Harris (Bruce Willis) who must tap into his killer instincts to survive the wilderness and the human predators as he tries to help a woman who witnesses a crime and finds herself running from a rural mountain town's corrupt police department after she took a video of police killing a drug dealer.

programme.title: Untraceable
programme.desc: A FBI secret service agent, gets caught in a deadly cat-and-mouse game with a serial killer who knows that people will log onto an "untraceable" website where he conducts violent and painful murders LIVE on the net. The more people who log on and enter the website, the quicker and more violently the victim dies.

programme.title: The Catcher Was A Spy
programme.desc: With an ensemble cast, this gripping, espionage thriller brings to life the true story of Moe Berg a World War II spy. His mission: go behind enemy lines in Europe to assassinate the Nazi's chief nuclear scientist before the Germans develop an atomic bomb. Berg must rely on his steel-trap intellect in a high-stakes game of cat and mouse - with the fate of the world hanging in the balance.

programme.title: Bad Samaritan
programme.desc: Bad Samaritan is a terrifying thriller of two young car valets who use their business as a front to burglarize houses of customers while they eat. Their lives are turned upside down when they rob the home of a demented serial killer after making a shocking discovery of a woman being held captive. They must choose to run and hide, or face the killer whose dark secrets they have just exposed.

programme.title: Aileen Wuornos: American Boogeywoman
programme.desc: True Story that follows America’s most notorious Female Serial killer. Based on Aileen Wuorno’s early life. Back in 1976 a young Aileen arrives in Florida searching for a new life, marries a wealthy yacht club president to start as part of Florida’s high society. Tormented by her inner demons she surrenders to her murderous impulses havoc in the peaceful community.

programme.title: Riders Of Justice
programme.desc: Markus goes home to his teenage daughter, Mathilde, when his wife dies in a train crash. All appears to be a tragic accident until a mathematics geek, who was also a fellow passenger on the train, and his two colleagues show up.

programme.title: Ted Bundy: American Boogeyman

A specter roams the highways of the gritty 1970s America hunting for his next prey. Tracking him are intrepid FBI female agent Kathleen & Robert Ressler organizers of the largest manhunt in history to apprehend America’s most Notorious infamous serial killer.
